title: Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple
tagline: Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple — spiritual town of Bihar

overview.short: The Lal Keshwar Shiv Mandir is a Hindu Temple in the city of Hajipur in Bihar, India.
overview.description: The Lal Keshwar Shiv Mandir is a Hindu Temple in the city of Hajipur in Bihar, India. Dedicated to Lord Shiva, it is located at Bagmusa (Hajipur), Vaishali. As per local folklore, it is said to have been in existence since ancient times and Lord Shiva is believed to be in the form of Lingam. Apart from anthropomorphic images of Shiva, the worship of Shiva in the form of a lingam, or linga, is also important.

topPlaces.name: Adalpur
topPlaces.description: Adalpur is a village in Mohiuddin nagar

topPlaces.name: Hajipur
topPlaces.description: Hajipur ( HAH-jip-oor, Hindi: [ˈɦaːdʒiːpʊr] ) is the headquarters and largest city of Vaishali district of the state of Bihar in India. Hajipur is the 16th most populous city of Bihar, besides being the second-fastest developing city, next to Patna.

topPlaces.name: Sonpur, Bihar
topPlaces.description: Sonpur, officially named Sonepur, is a city in the Indian state of Bihar, situated on the banks of the Gandaki River and Ganges River in the Saran District. Sonpur hosts Asia's largest cattle fair, which starts on Kartik Poornima.

topPlaces.name: Export Promotion Park of India, Hajipur
topPlaces.description: The Export Promotion Industrial Park, also known as EPIP, is a multiple-product export processing zone in Bihar and East India developed by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry, the Government of Bihar, and by the administrative body BIADA located in Hajipur, the zonal headquarter of the East Central Railway Zone. The Export Promotion Industrial Park of Hajipur, in the administrative Vaishali district, has 94 acres (38 ha; 0.147 sq mi) of land with modern infrastructure.

image.alt: Export Promotion Park of India, Hajipur

topPlaces.name: Hajipur (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Hajipur is a community development block located in Vaishali district, Bihar.

topPlaces.name: Sonepur Cattle Fair
topPlaces.description: Sonepur Cattle Fair is held on Kartik Poornima (the full moon day) over the months of November and December in Sonepur, Bihar, on the confluence of river Ganges (Gandak). It is also known as Harihar Kshetra Mela.

topPlaces.name: Gadai Sarai
topPlaces.description: Gadai Sarai is a Gram panchayat in Hajipur, vaishali District, Bihar.

topPlaces.name: Dighikala East
topPlaces.description: Dighikala East is a Gram panchayat in Hajipur, Vaishali district, Bihar. Dighikala East is a village (Now it has become a part of Hajipur Nagar Parishad.) in Hajipur block and located towards west from district headquarters Hajipur.

items.note: Adalpur is a village in Mohiuddin nagar

Hajipur ( HAH-jip-oor, Hindi: [ˈɦaːdʒiːpʊr] ) is the headquarters and largest city of Vaishali district of the state of Bihar in India. Hajipur is the 16th most populous city of Bihar, besides being the second-fastest developing city, next to Patna.

Sonpur, officially named Sonepur, is a city in the Indian state of Bihar, situated on the banks of the Gandaki River and Ganges River in the Saran District. Sonpur hosts Asia's largest cattle fair, which starts on Kartik Poornima.

The Export Promotion Industrial Park of Hajipur, in the administrative Vaishali district, has 94 acres (38 ha; 0.147 sq mi) of land with modern infrastructure.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Patna Junction (13 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lal Keshwar Shiv Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adalpur, Hajipur, Sonpur, Bihar, Export Promotion Park of India, Hajipur, Hajipur (community development block).
